content.question:
Fill in the blanks with a suitable word or phrase practising various tenses.
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

1. By the end of next year she ___ London for three years.

Fill in the blanks with a suitable word or phrase practising various tenses.
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

2. Since I came to work, you ___ nothing but complain!

Fill in the blanks with a suitable word or phrase practising various tenses.
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

3. As soon as they ___ stolen, they called the police.

Fill in the blanks with a suitable word or phrase practising various tenses.
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

4. We drove very slowly because snow ___ heavily.

Fill in the blanks with a suitable word or phrase practising various tenses.
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

5. That author's new book ___ next month.

Fill in the blanks with a suitable word or phrase practising various tenses.
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

6. We didn't realise we'd forgotten the tickets until ___ to the airport.

Fill in the blanks with a suitable word or phrase practising various tenses.
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

7. By December 15th we ___ in Greece for two months.

Fill in the blanks with a suitable word or phrase practising various tenses.
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

8. She ___ since 6 o'clock and still hasn't finished her homework.

Fill in the blanks with a suitable word or phrase practising various tenses.
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

9. Don't put too much in that bag or ___ .

Fill in the blanks with a suitable word or phrase practising various tenses.
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

10. Don't phone Mark now - it's late and he ___ bed.
content.answer: will have gone to || will have gone to / will be in

content.question:
Fill in the blanks with a suitable word or phrase.
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

11. The injured cyclist ___ 15 minutes for an ambulance to arrive.

Fill in the blanks with a suitable word or phrase.
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

12. If you had locked the door properly, the burglar ___ in.
content.answer: would not have been able to get || would not have been able to get / would not have broken

content.question:
Fill in the blanks with a suitable word or phrase.
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

content.question:
